fundamentals.name: iShares Silver Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The Trust seeks to reflect such performance before payment of the Trust's expenses and liabilities. It is not actively managed. The Trust does not engage in any activities designed to obtain a profit from, or to ameliorate losses caused by, changes in the price of silver.

news.paragraph: The iShares Silver ETF (SLV) has experienced a significant 35% decline, prompting analysis into its potential future performance. Concurrently, Selvita reported its Q1 2026 results and initiated a strategic options review, though the direct impact on SLV is not immediately clear from this information alone. The recent price action in SLV suggests a bearish sentiment, with the article posing questions about whether it represents a buying opportunity after the substantial drop.

headlines.title: Should You Buy the iShares Silver ETF After Its 35% Plunge? Here's What Could Happen Next.
Selvita reports Q1 2026 results and launches strategic options review

examples.body: $PSLV $SLV saw this on X … 1964 was the last year they were putting real silver in coins.
$SLV looks like its headed back to low 67s before going up, very slowly, again.
$SLV stuck between $68 and $70 to kill options. Sideways chop will continue next week.
